snippet.title: Tabaahi 🔥| Toxic (Hindi) | Rocking Star Yash, Kiara Advani, Tara Sutaria| Vishal Mishra, Raj Shekhar
snippet.description:
Tabaahi ❤️✨ — a melody that speaks straight to the heart.

Featuring Yash and Kiara Advani, this soulful track is beautifully sung and composed by Vishal Mishra. Let its heartfelt lyrics and mesmerizing melody stay with you long after the music ends. 🎶

🎵 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀
Song: Tabaahi
Movie: Toxic
Vocal & Composition: Vishal Mishra
Lyrics: Raj Shekhar
Music Assistants: Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah & Kandarpa Kalita
Music Production: Vishal Mishra, Bitupon Boruah, Kandarpa Kalita & Trihangku Lahkar
Guitars: Kandarpa Kalita
Drums: Trihangku Lahkar
Synths: Kandarpa Kalita & Bitupon Boruah
Backing Vocals: Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah & Trihangku Lahkar
Brass & Woodwinds Arranged by: Vishal Mishra 
Dubbed in Prague by: Steve Ferry 
Vocal Dub Coordinator: Santhosh Venky
Recorded & Mixed by Trihangku Lahkar @VMS
Mastered by Dave Kutch at The Mastering Palace

🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria & Rukmini Vasanth
Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

𝗧𝗼 𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺 & 𝗗𝗼𝘄𝗻𝗹𝗼𝗮𝗱 𝗙𝘂𝗹𝗹 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴:
Spotify - https://bit.ly/40HGcWM
JioSaavn - https://bit.ly/4r64g0r
Gaana - https://bit.ly/4cj2wxf
iTunes - https://apple.co/4b08NLV
Apple Music - https://apple.co/4b08NLV
Amazon Prime Music - https://amzn.to/4aIOT9n
YouTube Music - https://bit.ly/46A0DIV

Lyrics:
तोड़ो, सारे उसूलों को
छोड़ो, जाने दो भूलो को
तू हो बाहों में Aur  हर जगह तबाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Todo, Saare Usoolon Ko
Chhodo, Jaane Do Bhoolo Ko
Tu Ho Baahon Mein Aur Har Jagah Tabaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

ये लहर, ये हवा
कब चली पूछ के
रूह पे, क्यूँ भला
हो कोई बंदिशें
दुनिया के दस्तूर से आज ले रिहाई
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Yeh Lahar, Yeh Hawaa
Kab Chali Poochke
Rooh Pe, Kyun Bhala
Ho Koi Bandishein
Duniya Ke Dastoor Se Aaj Le Rihaayii
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

तू मुझे छील दे सांस की आग से
हर धड़क पे दोनो हो फना राख से
हर गलत सही-रेत पे लिखी गवाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही

Tu Mujhe Chheel De, Saans Ki Aag Se
Har Dhadak Pe Dono Ho Fana Raakh Se
Har Galat Sahi- Ret Pe Likhi Gawaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

#Tabaahi #Toxic #ToxicAFairyTale #Yash #RockingStarYash #GeetuMohandas #KiaraAdvani

🎵 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 𝐨𝐧 𝐙𝐞𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐧𝐲

snippet.title: Abdul Hannan, Samar Jafri - Khasara (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmQfCcBPd_tZU9DxYMsQb5g?sub_confirmation=1

Abdul Hannan, Samar Jafri - Khasara (Lyrics)

Karti ja karti ja
Mere dil ko tu chakna choor
Karti ja karti ja
Zaahir jo tera ye ghuroor
Mujhay tu ye bataati ja
Is zakhm ka marham kia
Kyun thori rasm-e-wafa
Imtehaan bara hai na
Kaisay ye huwa khasaara
Na mai sambhla dubaara
Aaye na karaar dil ko
Hai bebasi yahan
Haan maine to tha nibhaaya
Saath bara
Tu nahi to khaak dhundu
Manzileyn yahan
Tu rooth jaa, qubool naa humain
Tu door jaa, tou khaaq hum jiyen
Qurbat jou thi, jhoot se bhari
Rooh meri tum, dekey tou jaatin
Lou karte hein tumse duri
Kahani teri meri hai adhuri
Hai dua sada tum rahou jahan bhi jaana
Tu jeeta main haara, reh hi gaya kehne ko kia
Haan maine tou tha nibhaya saath bara
Tu nahi tou khaaq dhoondoon manzilein yahan
Kaisay ye huwa khasaara
Na mai sambhla dubaara
Aaye na karaar dil ko
Hai bebasi yahan

snippet.title: Ve Junoon | Awarapan 2 | Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani | Vishesh Bhatt | Mithoon, Sayeed Q., Subodhh
snippet.description:
Phir ishq karne chala kyun?
 
Beginning the musical journey of ‘Awarapan 2’, ‘Ve Junoon’ is composed by Mithoon, sung by Subodhh Sharma and penned by Sayeed Quadri. Featuring Emraan Hashmi and Disha Patani in the video, this song is yearning in its purest form.
 
#VeJunoon #Awarapan2 #EmraanHashmi #DishaPatani #Mithoon #SayeedQuadri #SubodhhSharma
 
Song Composed and Arranged by Mithoon
Lyrics: Sayeed Quadri
Singer: Subodhh Sharma
Song Creative Head: Anugrah
Music Production: Godswill Mergulhão
Music Assistants: Anugrah, Godswill Mergulhão, Eli Rodrigues & Kaushal Gohil
Guitars: Kalyan Baruah
Violin: Jitu Thakur
Backing Vocals: Abhishek Nailwal, Mihir Sharma & Kaustubh More
Recorded at Livingwater Music by A Manivannan
Song Mixed & Mastered by Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant Mixing Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai
Music Head Vishesh Films: Rohit Saini
 
Starring Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani, Shabana Azmi, Suvinder Vicky, Vijayant Kohli, Aniruddh Rawal, Atul Kumar
 
Vishesh Films & Mukesh Bhatt Present
A Vishesh Bhatt Production
 
AWARAPAN 2
Produced By Vishesh Bhatt
Directed By Nitin Kakkar
Director of Photography Vishnu Rao
Editor Devendra Murdeshwar
Production Designer Teena Paradkar
Choreographer Mudassar Khan
 
Theatrical Distribution Pen Marudhar
In Cinemas 14th August 2026

Intro
 
Chaha tha tune jisse Paaya kabhi na usse
 
Tujhko toh sab hai pataa, aye dil Saari khabar hai tujhe
 
Banjar hui hai aankhen Veeran hai ye saansen
Ab meri rooh ko na jalaa...naa jalaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil lutne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye Phir Ishq karne chala kyun…

snippet.title: Farak - Taare | Official Music Video |
snippet.description:
“There are evenings when the whole world seems misaligned.
To be loved then is a miracle.” - Franz Kafka

"Taare" is a part of Diwaar Ke Uss Paar, the second half of a story that began with Diwaar Ke Is Paar. Thank you for listening.

Listen on Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/2iVj11OdEBNIGUv9f7jGPK?si=inzh6JX8SxuCWRGbq-gx0A


Lyrics -

Humara thokaron se kuch purana khaas naata hai
Hai jisne ishq hi dekha na vo rab ka dulara hai

Humara thokaron se kuch purana khaas naata hai
Hai jisne ishq hi dekha na vo rab ka dulara hai

Ab Haal-e-dil to na poocho 
batate dar sa lagta hai
Is khaali ghar ko na looto
ye buzdil sar patakta hai

Vo ghar chhoota hai jab se Kambhakhat koi aasra na hai
Ye kaagaz kaanpta jab hote dil ke ghaav taaza hain

Ke lafz kuch aise hain
Gawaya is qadar ke
Gaur farmaiyega
Gawaya is qadar ke
Paane ko ab kuch bacha na hai
Parinda kaid pinjre mein
Parinda kaid pinjre mein
Use dar aasmaan ka hai


Gawaya is qadar ke paane ko ab kuch bacha na hai
parinda kaid pinjre mein use dar aasmaan ka hai

Jo bikhra toot ke fir vo
Samete na simat ta hai
Hain partein is qadar dil pe
Taraashe na nikharta hai

Halaaton se liya jab bair to har, daav haara main
Asal mein jeena mushkil Maut ka bas naam zyada hai
Ye kandhe jhuk rahe hai ummeedon ka bhaar zyaada hai

Andhere mein pala jo dar use bas roshni ka hai
Asal mein jeena mushkil maut ka bas naam zyada hai

snippet.title: Me Against The World | Derwaish (Official Visualiser) New Punjabi Rap Song | 2026
snippet.description:
ME AGAINST THE WORLD



🎵 CREDITS

Artist & Lyrics: Derwaish

Performed By: Derwaish

Music Production: Derwaish

Mix & Master: Derwaish



Two weeks of noise. Endless opinions. Daily disses.

This isn't a reply. It's a reminder.

Some people have spent the last two weeks trying everything to get my attention. They'll keep reaching, keep talking, keep chasing. Attention isn't something you demand—it's something you earn.


Listen to the bars . If your ego is louder than the music, that's your battle, not mine.

And if watching me grow, elevate, and take my place in Pakistan Hip Hop makes you uncomfortable, do yourself a favor and stay away from my music. I don't make songs to comfort people who pray on my downfall.

The throne doesn't move because the crowd is loud.

To everyone who supports real artistry, welcome. The rest can keep talking while I keep building.

Its Yo Boy Derwaish
